# daytona_expire_sandbox_signed_port_preview_url (Action)

Expires a Daytona sandbox signed port preview URL token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_expire_sandbox_signed_port_preview_url" "example" {
  config {
    sandbox_id_or_name = "sandbox-id-or-name"
    port               = 3000
    token              = "signed-preview-token"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `port` (Number) Sandbox port number for the signed preview URL.
- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Daytona sandbox ID or name.
- `token` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Signed preview URL token to expire. This value is write-only and is not returned by the provider.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID` for this action. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
